Biography:
Joe Goguen is a dedicated and driven individual who has built a life of service, leadership and family. A former U.S. Marine for over 20 years, Joe served with distinction, gaining invaluable experience in discipline, strategy, and leadership. After leaving the military, he transitioned into a second career in the car industry, where he held several key management positions for 20 years.

Over the years he became known for his strong work ethic, problem-solving abilities, and his ability to lead teams toward success.

Now, Joe is excited to embark on a new chapter in his career by entering the real estate in The Villages, where he aims to leverage his extensive experience to guide clients to achieve their dreams and property goals.

While his career accomplishments are numerous, Joe believes his greatest achievement is his family. As a proud father of 6 children and 5 grandchildren, he treasures every moment spent with them. His family is his foundation, and their well-being and success are his top priorities.

Joe brings a unique combination of discipline, management expertise and a passion for helping others achieve their dreams of the Lifestyle and home ownership in The Villages.

Chrystie joined Properties of The Villages sales team in January of 2017. She has been serving customers in sales, marketing, and advertising for over 20 years. She brings this knowledge and love for people to The Villages team.  A California native, Chrystie has lived all over the country including Atlanta, Dallas, West Virginia, Kentucky, Ohio, and San Diego.  Chrystie is 1996 graduate of The University of Indiana with a degree in Anthropology, Go Hoosiers!! Having studied different cultures across the globe helps Chrystie further serve customers from all over the world here in The Villages. 

Chrystie’s first experience in The Villages, like the experience of so many others, was visiting friends. Over the next several years after coming to visit this amazing place more and more often with her family the time had come to make The Villages their hometown. One of the best benefits of making The Villages home was that her 4 children got the opportunity to attend The Villages Charter School. For the first two years living here, she also worked at The Villages Elementary Primary Center. The entire family feels blessed to be a part of such a wonderful community that just keeps getting better! 

When not working you can find Chrystie enjoying all the amazing things Central Florida has to offer, including hiking, kayaking, paddle boarding, spending time at the beautiful natural springs, or making the quick trip to either coast to enjoy some time at the beach. 

“I enjoy working for Properties of The Villages for many reasons. I love helping people realize their retirement dreams in this wonderful community with all it has to offer. Every day I get to meet new people with amazing life experiences and become part of their journey. I feel incredibly blessed to be a part of an environment that is always focused on improving and creating an amazing experience for our residents. Being part of a family that puts people first and helps our customers realize their dreams is such an honor. My residents are like family and I treasure the relationships we have built together!”

As a family man, former Marine, avid golfer, sports fanatic and man of God, Robbie not only understands the importance of family, faith and a healthy lifestyle, but also how your community can have a positive and profound impact on your life and well-being.

Originally a New Hampshire native, Robbie spent his early years in the Northeast before moving to Florida, where he attended high school in nearby Ocala.

After the world was shook by the events of 9/11, Robbie felt it was his civic duty to fight for his country, and in May of 2002 he enlisted in the U.S Marine Corps. He served a total of six years in the USMC achieving the rank of E-5/Sgt. During his enlistment, Robbie spent 7 months in Iraq delivering beans, bullets and Band-Aids to fellow Marines; was accepted into Marine Security Guard School in which he learned computer and monitoring systems to operate and lock down American Embassies; and spent just under a year in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, as well as his final two years in Okinawa, Japan.

Upon receiving an honorable discharge from the Marine Corps in 2008, Robbie wanted to spend more time with his family and began working for his father at the Bill Bryan Auto Group. His years spent in the automotive industry not only taught him of cars and horsepower, but how the trust and rapport built with his customers was more fulfilling than the sale of a car. While the auto industry and real estate markets were on the decline throughout the country in his years at Bill Bryan, Robbie noticed that The Villages market seemed to stay consistent and allowed him to continue to help people find reliable vehicles suitable to their financial parameters.

During his time in the auto industry, he began connections with Villagers and realized his passion for building relationships were mirrored in The Villages company values—this propelled him to seek a position helping people find their dream home in Florida’s Friendliest Hometown.

If you were to ask Robbie who his biggest fans and role models are, he would surely say his loving parents, Robert and Phyllis, and his son, Sultan. Growing up, his mother always told him to count his blessings and not his problems, which accrues to his never-ending devotion to his relationships with not only friends and family, but acquaintances and strangers alike. Robbie’s strong faith in God and “What would Jesus do?” mindset push him to help those in need or those less fortunate than he.

In his free time, you’ll find Robbie golfing, spending time with friends and family, and watching or playing sports such as basketball and baseball. Along with watching a great game comes enjoying a great beer, which Robbie does by trying different types of brews and breweries to complement his competitive, loyal fandom.


As your Properties of The Villages Representative, Robbie’s goal is to be your professional expert with your unique and specific needs in mind.
